---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability, experiment, or tooling improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Motivation

What problem or use case would this improve?

## Proposal

Describe the capability, design direction, or experiment you want to add.

## Scope

Is this primarily about:

- controller logic
- integration surface
- instrumentation
- benchmarking
- documentation

## Additional context

Include references, related papers, prior art, or examples if helpful.
